target.title: feat: add tart provider for macOS VMs on Apple Silicon
target.body:
## Summary

Add a `tart` provider for running macOS VMs on Apple Silicon via [Cirrus Labs tart](https://github.com/cirruslabs/tart). This enables local macOS staging environments using Apple's native Virtualization.framework -- no Parallels license needed.

## How it works

- **Acquire**: `tart clone` from OCI base image, `tart set` CPU/memory (disk only when explicit), `tart run --no-graphics`, poll `tart ip`, inject SSH key via `tart exec`, wait for SSH readiness
- **Resolve**: find running VM by `crabbox-` name prefix; stopped VMs rejected for SSH-target commands, reported for status
- **List**: `tart list --source local --format json` filtered by prefix
- **Release**: `tart stop` + `tart delete`
- **Cleanup**: garbage collect stale crabbox-owned VMs past idle timeout (including malformed claims)
- **Doctor**: verify tart CLI and list capability; counts only `crabbox-` VMs
- **SSH key injection**: via `tart exec` with POSIX user validation and public key escaping (no sshpass, no credentials on argv)
- **Ready check**: macOS-safe `uname -s && test -d ~` (no crabbox-ready script needed)
- **Kept lease persistence**: `tart run` is detached via `Process.Release()` for `--keep` leases so the VM survives crabbox exit

## Final-head host smoke (0fb1755, M4 Pro, Tart 2.32.1)

Built from `feat/local-tart-provider` head on Apple Silicon (M4 Pro, macOS, Go 1.26.4).

### warmup --keep
```
provisioning provider=tart lease=cbx_a48b40c38306 slug=coral-crayfish image=ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-ventura-base:latest cpus=4 memory=8192MB disk=clone-default keep=true
provisioned lease=cbx_a48b40c38306 instance=crabbox-coral-crayfish-a4d5268f state=ready
leased cbx_a48b40c38306 slug=coral-crayfish provider=tart server=crabbox-coral-crayfish-a4d5268f type=ghcr.io_cirruslabs_macos-ventura-base_latest ip=192.168.64.2 idle_timeout=30m0s
ready ssh=admin@192.168.64.2:22 network=public workroot=/Users/admin/crabbox
warmup complete total=14.463s
```

### status --id
```
cbx_a48b40c38306 slug=coral-crayfish provider=tart target=macos state=ready host=192.168.64.2 ready=true idle_for=15s idle_timeout=30m0s
```

### run --id (kept-lease reuse)
```
syncing /private/tmp/crabbox-tart-smoke -> 192.168.64.2:/Users/admin/crabbox/cbx_a48b40c38306/crabbox-tart-smoke
sync complete in 3.601s
running on 192.168.64.2 echo 'hello from 0fb1755'
hello from 0fb1755
command complete in 121ms total=3.734s
```

### stop + cleanup
```
released lease=cbx_a48b40c38306 instance=crabbox-coral-crayfish-a4d5268f
tart cleanup removed=0 claims_removed=0 checked=0
tart list --source local: []
```

All exit codes 0.

## Configuration

CLI flags: `--tart-image`, `--tart-cpu`, `--tart-memory`, `--tart-disk`

YAML (`.crabbox.yaml`):
```yaml
tart:
  image: ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-ventura-base:latest
  user: admin
  cpus: 4
  memory: 8192
  # disk: 80  # only set to resize beyond the base image default
```

Env vars: `CRABBOX_TART_IMAGE`, `CRABBOX_TART_USER`, `CRABBOX_TART_WORK_ROOT`, `CRABBOX_TART_CPUS`, `CRABBOX_TART_MEMORY`, `CRABBOX_TART_DISK`

## Not included (follow-up)

- Desktop/VNC (tart VMs run headless; Screen Sharing setup is a follow-up)
- Shared-directory mounts (`tart run --dir`; needs explicit host-mount config)
- Checkpoint/fork (tracked as a separate follow-up PR)

## Files changed

- `internal/providers/tart/` -- provider, backend, core, flags, tests
- `internal/cli/config.go` -- TartConfig struct, file config, env var loading
- `internal/cli/status.go` -- StatusOnly resolve request for stopped-VM reporting
- `internal/cli/provider_backend.go` -- StatusOnly field on ResolveRequest
- `internal/cli/config_test.go` -- tart provider config defaults coverage
- `internal/cli/providers_builtin_test.go` -- test provider registration
- `internal/providers/all/all.go` -- import registration
- `docs/providers/tart.md` -- provider documentation
- `docs/providers/README.md` -- provider table entry
- `docs/source-map.md` -- source map entry

## Test plan

- [x] 99 provider unit tests pass (`go test ./internal/providers/tart/`)
- [x] CLI config coverage test pass (`go test ./internal/cli/ -run TestTartConfigDefaultsFileAndEnv`)
- [x] `go build` / `go vet` / `gofmt` clean
- [x] Final-head host smoke on M4 Pro (0fb1755, Tart 2.32.1): warmup, status, kept-lease reuse, stop, cleanup -- all exit 0
- [x] SSH key injection via tart exec with POSIX user validation
- [x] Shell injection rejected (6 payloads tested)
- [x] Stopped VM rejected for SSH-target commands (ssh/vnc/code/cache/egress), reported for status
- [x] Malformed claims cleaned up in garbage collection
- [x] CPU floor (>=4) and memory floor (>=4096 MB) enforced from CLI, env, and config
- [x] Disk resize only applied when --tart-disk is explicitly set; no implicit 50GB default
- [x] Only crabbox- prefixed VMs counted in doctor/acquire
- [x] OCI cache entries excluded via --source local
- [x] Scope prefix validation on instanceNameFromScope
- [x] Public key single-quote escaping in SSH injection
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
